rationale_per_step.extend-ci-eval-coverage: Testing/Observability + DX: wire the remaining smoke evals (parse, merged, semantic-search-scenario, orchestrator-mock, and the composite eval:smoke) into the CI verify job so all quality invariants run on every PR/merge. Completes the measurable research quality loop. Current CI only runs the first three; scripts for the rest already exist and pass locally.
rationale_per_step.add-research-evidence-highlighting: Feature improvement / agent research: surface key evidence highlights or source links more prominently in research output (research-summary, founder-profile, timeline) and company profiles to strengthen traceability and user trust in 'evidence-backed' outcomes. Builds on existing basic Sources lists.
rationale_per_step.expand-eval-coverage-freshness: Testing/Observability: add or extend lightweight checks for data freshness (last-updated signals on companies) or broader scenario coverage in evals to close the 'measurable research quality' loop from vision. Low-I/O, hermetic where possible.
